commit_message.subject: Add loading overlay for project import and opening
commit_message.body:
Implement a global loading state 'isImporting' to provide visual feedback
during long-running project import operations (ZIP, directory, file)
and when opening existing projects. This ensures users are aware of
background processing for large files.

Key changes:
- Added 'isImporting' to UIState and 'SET_IMPORTING' to EditorAction.
- Updated editorReducer to handle the new action.
- Integrated state updates into useImport hook and PDFUploader.
- Added loading overlay components to Home and PDFUploader pages.
